title: Aporum pseudoequitans
taxonomy: Aporum pseudoequitans is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It is a terrestrial orchid, typically found in tropical regions. The classification of Aporum pseudoequitans places it within the genus Aporum, which is a group of orchids native to the Pacific Islands and surrounding areas. Aporum pseudoequitans is often confused with Aporum equitans, but they are distinct species. The classification of Aporum pseudoequitans has undergone revisions over time, with some sources considering it a synonym of Aporum equitans.
